mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ARCHIVE_FILE (ARCHIVE_ID, FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE) VALUES (#{archiveId}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize})
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID, ARCHIVE_ID, FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, UPLOADED_AT FROM ARCHIVE_FILE WHERE ARCHIVE_ID = #{archiveId} ORDER BY FILE_ID
